titleStmt.title: SII 24.236: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 236. (A.R. No. 97 of 1937-38.) WEST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Kuravaiśēri Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭa Sarvvakratu of Nāgalamahādēvichaturvēdimaṅgalam. The record belongs to the 2+1st regnal year of the king and the details of the date viz., Mēsha, ba. 10, Sunday, Rēvati, correspond to A.D. 1316, April 18. Here also the combination of the nakshatra Rēvatī with the other details is impossible and therefore it must be taken as a mistake for Pūraṭṭādi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Engraved in continution of No. 96.komāṟapaṉmarāna tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaradevarkku yāṇṭu 2 varuṣam Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revatināḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷaṉāṭṭu viḷāṉāṭṭuk koyilakaram śrīmannāgalamahādeviccaturvedimaṅka
lattu kuravaceri nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa ssarvakratu veṉ nilam vilai pramāṇam koyilakaram śrīkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅka[ lattu bhaṭṭa] kaḷukku Iṟṟai ṉāḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ikkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu vaṭakkil teruvil vaṭaciṟakil Eṭṭekāl vāl niḷattukku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil vāniḷattu Eṉṉutāna vāstuśeṣa kuḻi 3 10 2 Ikkuḻi muppattiraṇṭum Iṉṉilattil kāykkiṟa teṅku Añcum pāḷai teṅku patiṉaiñcum kāykkiṟa maram Oṉṟu
ṭpukātaṭi Oṉṟum periya I Oṉṟum Āka kaluḷḷa sala vṛkṣaṅ viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāka Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku naṟkuḷikai 10 7u Ippaṇam Eḻupatum mu vṛkṣaṅkaḷuṭaṉ Ikkuḻi muppattiraṇṭum vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaiykkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukkuk kuravaiceri nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa ssarvakratuveṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta
ṅkaḷukkum Ikkuḻi muppattiraṇ vatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭa varavum Ivarkaḷukku ṅkaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu nila vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku kuravaiceri nārāyaṇabhaṭṭassarvakratuveṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta
ṟṟukku vṛkṣaṅ Inta paṇam Eḻupatum koṇṭeṉ koṇṭa tāvaḷattil nācci Oru kiḻippaṭapaṟṟil koyil ḷaippaṇam Eḻupatum paṟṟik ko lavṛkṣaṅkaḷuṭaṉe Ikkuḻi muppattiraṇṭum viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku kuravaiceri nārāyaṇa
bhaṭṭava paṭikku Ivai Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi paṇam Eḻupatum pārttuk kuṭuttamaikku Ivai Eḻumpotaḻakiyār Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
